_comment: WC2026 Group J, MD3. Standings before: Argentina 6 (3-0 Algeria, 2-0 Austria, GD +5, GA 0) ALREADY top and effectively assured of 1st; Austria 3, Algeria 3, Jordan 0 (1-3 Austria, 1-2 Algeria) eliminated. Argentina the dominant side (rating 95, two clean sheets); Jordan weak (66) and out. Argentina a huge favourite. Possible light rotation with 1st all but locked, but NO speculative rotation discount (Mexico lesson) -> only a small trim. Home = Argentina, away = Jordan. Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Argentina (6 pts) all but assured of topping the group; Jordan (0 pts) eliminated. Argentina a heavy favourite; the result barely affects J's qualification picture, which hinges on Austria-Algeria.

home.name: Argentina
notes: Dominant (rating 95): 3-0 Algeria, 2-0 Austria, two clean sheets. attack 1.45.
1st all but locked; possible light rotation but no speculative discount (Mexico lesson).

away.name: Jordan
notes: Leaky vs a top side. defense 1.15.

_postmatch.result: Argentina 3-1 Jordan. Argentina win the group with a perfect nine points (GD +7); Jordan finish last (0 pts) and out, as expected.
_postmatch.verdict: 1X2 hit comfortably. Argentina won as the heavy favourite; the 3-1 sits right in the modal band (xG 2.62 -> 3 goals, near-exact) and Jordan's consolation made it Over 2.5 / not the clean sheet (37% miss, the minority branch). No qualification stakes -- a formality, correctly modelled. The earlier market-alignment lift (77% -> 84%) was the right call: do not fade an elite favourite.
_postmatch.lesson: Standard heavy-favourite hit; the only note is the upheld rule from the recalibration -- aligning to the market on a 7-pt under-lean was correct (Spain/elite-favourite lesson). Dead-rubber-for-Jordan but Argentina went full; no rotation discount was applied and Argentina indeed scored three.
